spec.name: grep
spec.description: Search for patterns in files and return matching lines.

pattern.description: The regex pattern to search for.

request.rationale: The standard file_read and read_file tools are returning truncated content. I need a way to extract the full content of spec.md and events.txt. Using grep with a wildcard pattern '.' will allow me to retrieve all lines from these files to perform the required scoring calculation.
